metadata.name: Layover Destination Designer
metadata.author: naagdev
metadata.description: Discover the perfect layover destination using AI-powered multi-agent orchestration

skills.name: Plan Layover Destination
skills.description: Find optimal 2-6 day layover destinations based on personal preferences, budget, and travel style

phases.name: Context Gathering
phases.description: Progressive questioning to understand traveler profile

phases.name: Preferences Deep-Dive
phases.description: Detailed exploration of vibe, safety, budget, and logistics

phases.name: Research & Clustering
phases.description: Research destinations and cluster into optimal groups

phases.name: Final Recommendation
phases.description: Decision-making with weighted framework and ranking

examples.useCase1: Professional with travel companion planning cultural European layover
examples.useCase2: First-time traveler seeking adventure and authentic local experience
